body_transformation: The rounded head with pointed ears now carries sharp, jagged lightning-bolt spines along the crown, while the short stubby legs gain sparking fur tips at the joints. The beige shell transforms into a sleek, electric blue carapace with neon green circuit-like patterns tracing its ridges. The light blue body coloration shifts to a vibrant electric blue, and the pale underbelly becomes a glowing neon green. Subtle glowing cracks in the shell texture hint at contained energy, maintaining the original silhouette and proportions.
signature_feature: Shell ridges: electric blue carapace with neon green circuit patterns and faint glowing cracks.
